notes: 63 hours and almost beat the game. Boots and runs just fine. Some minor graphical happened a few times which aren't game-breaking or significant which fixed themselves by going to the next dialogue. Playtime was split between this PC and my Manjaro laptop with an i5-7200U.
title: Evenicle

notes: Minor graphical glitches that can be fixed by checking "compatibility mode" in the game settings. Opening and ending movies will not play and the game will give an error message, but will otherwise continue without any issues. The movies can be found in the game directory and be watched manually. Otherwise the game plays perfectly.
title: Evenicle

cpu: AMD A12-9720P RADEON R7, 12 COMPUTE CORES 4C+8G

title: Evenicle
